_comment: OPTIONAL. resolve-config.sh auto-detects package manager (lockfile), layout (monorepo | flat | expo), mobile/Expo presence, and ORM — most apps need NO config file. Add this only to override a detection, then delete every key you don't override. Values below show the monorepo defaults.
_flatLayoutExample: A flat single-app repo auto-resolves to: designTokens=src/config/design.ts, globalsCss=src/app/globals.css, brandSource=src/config/brand.ts, webApp=., mobileApp=null, devUrl=http://localhost:3000. A standalone Expo app resolves layout=expo, devUrl=http://localhost:8081, dev='<pm> start', mobileApp='.'. Override here only if your paths differ.
